steps.title: Focus on replica materials
steps.content: The student's goal is a generalization about materials used in dhow replicas. The relevant notes say builders use a mix of modern and traditional materials, with most materials traditional.

steps.title: Reject narrow or off-topic facts
steps.content:
• Choice A: It focuses on one material rather than the general mix.
  • Choice B: It describes ancient dhows, not replica materials.
  • Choice D: It introduces builders and hull construction but not the materials overall.

steps.title: Use the broad material pattern
steps.content: The best generalization states both sides of the pattern: replica builders mostly use traditional materials but also use some modern ones. The answer is C.
